2605.29563.title: Planning with the Views via Scene Self-Exploration
2605.29563.paper_summary: Can VLMs predict how each camera move changes the view, and plan many such moves ahead? We call this capability view planning, requiring (1)understanding how a single action transforms the view, and (2)composing many such transformations across multi-turn plans to identify a target view. We probe both abilities in our proposed ViewSuite, a 3D point-cloud environment on real ScanNet scenes. Across 13 frontier VLMs, a critical planning gap emerges: they possess basic view-action knowledge but fail to compose it across multi-turn plans, with the gap widening as viewpoint distance grows. To close this gap, we propose an iterative framework that alternates self-exploration with view graph distillation. The key insight is that all exploration trajectories, regardless of their outcome, collectively form a view graph that compactly captures how viewpoints connect across a scene. Distilling this graph into diverse supervised tasks reshapes the policy distribution and overcomes the sparse rewards that stall pure RL. This improves Qwen2.5-VL-7B from 2.5% to 47.8% on interactive view planning, surpassing GPT-5.4 Pro (18.5%) and Gemini 3.1 Pro (21.4%). Self-exploration emerges as a promising path toward VLMs that can actively reason and plan in 3D space.
2605.29563.paper_summary_zh: VLM能否預測每次相機移動如何改變視角，並提前計劃多次這樣的移動？我們稱這種能力為視角規劃，這需要(1)理解單一行動如何轉變視角，以及(2)在多輪計劃中組合多次這樣的轉變以識別目標視角。我們在提出的ViewSuite中探討這兩種能力，這是一個基於真實ScanNet場景的3D點雲環境。在13個前沿VLM中，出現了一個關鍵的規劃差距：它們擁有基本的視角-行動知識，但未能在多輪計劃中組合這些知識，隨著視點距離的增長，這一差距越來越大。為了縮小這一差距，我們提出了一個迭代框架，交替進行自我探索和視圖圖的提煉。關鍵的見解是，所有探索軌跡無論其結果如何，集體形成了一個視圖圖，緊湊地捕捉了視點如何在場景中連接。將這個圖提煉成多樣的監督任務重塑了策略分佈，克服了純強化學習中停滯的稀疏獎勵。這使得Qwen2.5-VL-7B在互動視角規劃中的表現從2.5%提高到47.8%，超越了GPT-5.4 Pro（18.5%）和Gemini 3.1 Pro（21.4%）。自我探索成為通向能夠在3D空間中主動推理和規劃的VLM的有希望的途徑。
2605.29563.author: Kangrui Wang et.al.
2605.29563.authors: Kangrui Wang, Linjie Li, Zhengyuan Yang, Shiqi Chen, Zihan Wang, Li Fei-Fei, Jiajun Wu, Leonidas Guibas, Lijuan Wang, Manling Li
